title: Data Management
backupDesc: Export the entire library as a zip file, including all resources and snapshots.
restoreDesc: Restore the library from a backup file. Current data will be overwritten.
restoreConfirm: Restoring will overwrite all current data. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
restoreSyncWarning: After restoring, the next sync will merge with cloud data. Newer changes on the cloud (including deletions) will overwrite data from the backup. To keep the backup data, disable auto-sync after restoring.
